name: CrowdStrike

auth.notes: OAuth2 client_credentials only (no authorize URL). API client ID and secret are generated in Falcon console. Token must be refreshed every 30 minutes. Unauthenticated requests limited to 15/min per source IP.

rateLimits.global: 6000 requests per minute per customer account
rateLimits.unauthenticated: 15 requests per minute per source IP
rateLimits.notes: Sliding window enforcement. 429 Too Many Requests returned when exceeded. Rate limit is shared across all API clients and endpoints within a customer account.

scim.notes: CrowdStrike does not natively expose a SCIM endpoint. SCIM provisioning is available through IdP integrations (e.g., Okta, PingOne) that map to the Falcon User Management API.

sdk.notes: falconjs is an open source community project (MIT license), not an official CrowdStrike product. No formal support. Uses fetch API internally.

webhooks.notes: Event Streams provide continuous real-time security events. Also supports Falcon Fusion workflows with webhook actions for sending data to third-party endpoints.

sandbox.notes: No free developer sandbox for the Falcon platform API. Falcon Sandbox (hybrid-analysis.com) is available for malware analysis only, not user management APIs. A CrowdStrike Falcon subscription is required to access user management APIs.

needs_verification: Exact API scopes required for user management (user-management:read/write assumed from documentation patterns)
Whether oauth2/revoke endpoint exists (common OAuth2 pattern but not explicitly confirmed)
Exact host group API paths (may vary between v1/v2)
Complete list of Event Stream event types
Whether suspendUser operation exists (may be handled via deleteUser or role revocation)
